name: Made4More (M4M)
desc: The client was super impressed with my approach to his project. M4M is an online broadcasting network whose main audience are teens and youth from ages 15–35. Through an in-depth brand strategy session and market research I developed a logo that portrayed the brand's professionalism and nature of service but imbibed a color scheme that would appeal to the target audience and influence their engagement.

focus: Youth appeal, professionalism, engagement — for a 15–35 audience.
